Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumn.ColumnPumparound

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.ColumnPumparound
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DistillationColumn
public static class DistillationColumn.ColumnPumparound extends Object implements Serializable
Liquid pumparound circuit that withdraws liquid from one tray, changes temperature, and returns it to another tray.
Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnPumparound

      public ColumnPumparound(String name, int drawTrayNumber, int returnTrayNumber, double drawFraction, double temperatureDrop)
      Create a liquid pumparound definition.
      Parameters:
      name - pumparound name
      drawTrayNumber - tray index where liquid is withdrawn
      returnTrayNumber - tray index where cooled/heated liquid is returned
      drawFraction - fraction of tray liquid traffic withdrawn
      temperatureDrop - temperature drop from draw to return in Kelvin

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Get the pumparound name.
      Returns:
      pumparound name

    • getDrawTrayNumber

      public int getDrawTrayNumber()
      Get the draw tray number.
      Returns:
      draw tray index

    • getReturnTrayNumber

      public int getReturnTrayNumber()
      Get the return tray number.
      Returns:
      return tray index

    • getDrawFraction

      public double getDrawFraction()
      Get the liquid draw fraction.
      Returns:
      draw fraction

    • getTemperatureDrop

      public double getTemperatureDrop()
      Get the temperature drop from draw to return.
      Returns:
      temperature drop in Kelvin

    • getDrawStream

      public StreamInterface getDrawStream()
      Get the latest liquid draw stream.
      Returns:
      latest draw stream, or null before the column has been run

    • getReturnStream

      public StreamInterface getReturnStream()
      Get the latest liquid return stream.
      Returns:
      latest return stream, or null before the first draw update

    • updateReturnStream

      private double updateReturnStream(StreamInterface newDrawStream, UUID id)
      Update the return stream from a tray liquid draw.
      Parameters:
      newDrawStream - latest liquid draw stream
      id - calculation identifier
      Returns:
      relative change in return flow rate
